task_summary: Price-match refund on a split-payment smartphone order. The order must stay active and the refund must be treated as a price adjustment, not a cancellation.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must issue the $50 price-match refund without cancelling the order.
Agent must address the split-payment concern without changing the required price-match workflow.
Agent must not process a return or cancellation.
Agent must preview the $50 split-tender price adjustment and obtain explicit user confirmation before finalizing the refund.
Agent must not finalize the refund in the same assistant turn that first explains split-tender handling.

opening_message: My phone in ORD-7202 dropped by $50. I paid partly with a gift card, so I need you to fix the price without cancelling anything.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7202. Price-match refund on a split-payment smartphone order. The order must stay active and the refund must be treated as a price adjustment, not a cancellation. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
unknown_info: how split tender affects price match
task_rules: Insist that the phone is fine and should remain active.
Ask whether split tender changes the adjustment.
Do not accept a completed refund unless the agent first previews the split-tender price adjustment and asks you to confirm before finalizing it.
